Published: 2026-03-05 18:30:04 EET Nokia - Annual Financial Report

Nokia has published its Nokia in 2025 Annual Report and filed its Annual Report on Form 20-F for 2025

Nokia Corporation Stock Exchange Release 5 March 2026 at 18:30 EET
